description: Court record in the hand of Avraham b. Natan. Location: Fustat. Dated: 24 Elul, year missing. (A prior description suggested that it is dated Elul [14]24 Seleucid = 1113 CE.) Involves Abū l-[...] Mevorakh Segulat ha-Parnasim (appears also in Bodl. MS heb. d 66/1 (PGPID 19389)); and Abū l-Murajjā [...] ha-Kohen b. [...] Ibn al-Nāqid, who might be Abū l-Murajjā Yosef b. Mevorakh Ibn al-Nāqid from T-S 13J2.8 (PGPID 1014). Concerning the dissolution of a partnership. Mentions a sum of 3 dinars less one qirat, possibly an outstanding debt whose schedule of repayment to Abū l-Murajjā is specified here. There are two lines in Arabic script in the top margin repeating some of the phrases from the document, including "1.5 dirhams every week" and the release formulae. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
